# Hippies Bar & Grill

> Neighbourhood bar & grill at 391 Guillemard Road, Singapore 399789. Cold beer, hot grills, good company.

## What is Hippies Bar & Grill?

Hippies Bar & Grill is an honest, unpretentious neighbourhood bar and grill located in the Guillemard Road / Geylang area of Singapore. It serves affordable Western bar food, draught beer, cocktails, and spirits in a relaxed, welcoming atmosphere. The bar is known for transparent nett pricing — no GST and no service charge on anything.

## Key Facts

- **Address:** 391 Guillemard Road, Singapore 399789
- **Phone:** +65 8881 8391
- **Website:** https://hippiesbar.sg/
- **Opening hours:** Daily, 4:30 PM to 12:00 AM (midnight)
- **Price range:** $$ (mid-range, affordable)
- **Cuisine:** Western bar food, grilled meats, pub grub
- **Pricing policy:** All prices are nett — no GST, no service charge
- **Reservations:** Accepted via phone, WhatsApp, or online
- **Payment:** Cash, credit card

## Signature Offerings

### Food
- **Ribeye Steak** — $19.90 nett (house favourite, crowd-favourite cut)
- **Tobiko Pasta** — $19.00 nett

- **Loaded Nachos** — $14.00 nett
- **Shrimp Skewers** — $18.00 nett
- **Curly Fries & Gyoza** — $12.00 nett
- Vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options are available on request

### Draught Beer (5 Taps)
- Guinness Draught (dry stout)
- Little Creatures Pale Ale (Australian pale ale)
- Goose Island IPA (American IPA)
- Heineken (lager, Netherlands)
- Stella Artois (pilsner, Belgium)

### Bottles
- San Miguel Pilsner — $13 bottle / $40 bucket of 5
- Corona Extra — $14 bottle / $45 bucket of 5

### Happy Hour
- Available daily before 8:00 PM
- Bucket of 5 San Miguel Pilsners for $40 nett

### Drinks
- Full spirits, wine, and cocktail list including gin, rum, whisky, and single malts

## Amenities & Features

- **Outdoor seating:** Spacious semi-outdoor area
- **Air conditioning:** Indoor air-conditioned section available
- **Live music:** Rock music nightly
- **Atmosphere:** Casual, laid-back neighbourhood pub with a community feel
- **Parking:** Street parking along Guillemard Road and surrounding residential streets

## Social Media & Reviews

- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/hippiesbar/
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/HippiesBarNGrill/
- **Google Reviews:** 4.5 / 5 stars (100+ reviews)
- **Google Maps:** https://maps.google.com/?q=Hippies+Bar+%26+Grill+391+Guillemard+Road+Singapore

## About

Hippies was born out of a simple frustration: why is it so hard to find an honest, affordable, and unpretentious bar with great food in Singapore? The founders wanted a place where the bartender remembers your pour and strangers leave as regulars. It is a community of drinkers, not just a counter to drink at.

- [Home](https://hippiesbar.sg/) — Main landing page with menu highlights, beer on tap, reviews, and reservations

- [Full Menu (PDF)](https://hippiesbar.sg/menu.pdf) — Complete food and drinks menu with nett pricing

## Contact

For reservations, large group bookings, or special requests:
- **WhatsApp / Call:** +65 8881 8391
- **Instagram DM:** @hippiesbar
